name: storybook-codex
description: Plugin-ready Codex skill for creating, reviewing, syncing, and auditing React, Vue, and Svelte Storybook stories with controls, play() flows, design-token globals, and visual QA hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Storybook stories for React, Vue, and Svelte.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex skill for creating, reviewing, and auditing React, Vue, and Svelte Storybook stories using framework-aware story formats, selective controls, autodocs tags, interaction tests, token-aware globals, and optional Chromatic or Playwright visual coverage.
defaultPrompt: Use $storybook-codex to create stories for src/components/Button.tsx.
Use $storybook-codex to create stories for src/components/InfoPanel.vue.
Use $storybook-codex to create native Svelte stories for src/lib/StatusPill.svelte.
Use $storybook-codex to update existing stories to StoryObj, play(), and autodocs.
Use $storybook-codex to audit Storybook health in this repo.
Use $storybook-codex to scaffold Chromatic or local visual regression for this Storybook project.
